name: doc-quality-ocr-degraded
anchor: Doc quality axis: OCR-degraded scanned document
rationale: loan_application doc text simulates OCR degradation: character substitutions common in OCR (O→0, l→1, S→5, B→8, etc.). E.g., 'Lo4n Amount: $28O,OOO' instead of 'Loan Amount: $280,000'. F1.LA + F1.PV canonical extractors must handle OCR-style noise OR escalate. Tests LLM-extraction robustness on degraded docs.
notes: Single-event sequence. OCR simulation via character-level substitution in pdfSynth extraText — crude representation of scanned-PDF degradation since synthesizing actual image-based PDFs without text layer is out of scope.
